```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:0.85em 1em 0.95em;border-radius:18px;">

 <!-- T-bar: where skills are installed -->
 <div style="background:#DCE9FA;border:1px solid #A6C4EA;border-radius:12px;padding:0.4em 0.85em;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.7em;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(58,125,201,0.1);text-align:left;">
  <div style="width:1.7em;height:1.7em;border-radius:0.45em;background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid #A6C4EA;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#3A7DC9;flex-shrink:0;"><i data-lucide="house" style="width:0.9em;height:0.9em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
  <div style="font-size:0.6em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.25;">Claude loads skills only from <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.85em;background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid #A6C4EA;color:#3A7DC9;padding:0.05em 0.4em;border-radius:5px;">~/.claude/skills/</code></div>
 </div>

 <!-- divider -->
 <div style="height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#C4C3E8,transparent);margin:0.65em 0 0;"></div>

 <!-- two groups: Store it safely (purple) | Name it wisely (teal) -->
 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.8em;align-items:stretch;margin-top:1.1em;">

  <!-- LEFT GROUP: Store it safely -->
  <div style="position:relative;background:#F5F4FB;border-top:3px solid #5654A2;border-radius:14px;padding:0.9em 0.75em 0.75em;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(86,84,162,0.14);display:flex;flex-direction:column;text-align:left;">
   <div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.3em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.4em;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#FFFFFF;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#6462B4,#5654A2);padding:0.45em 1em;border-radius:999px;box-shadow:0 5px 16px rgba(86,84,162,0.4);white-space:nowrap;z-index:2;"><i data-lucide="shield" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:2.2;"></i>Store it safely</div>

   <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.45em;flex:1;justify-content:space-between;">

    <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.42em 0.7em;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.5em 1fr;gap:0.6em;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(86,84,162,0.08);">
     <div style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;border-radius:0.4em;background:#EEEDF8;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#5654A2;"><i data-lucide="triangle-alert" style="width:0.8em;height:0.8em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
     <div style="font-size:0.55em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.2;">The hidden folder is fragile</div>
    </div>

    <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.42em 0.7em;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.5em 1fr;gap:0.6em;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(86,84,162,0.08);">
     <div style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;border-radius:0.4em;background:#EEEDF8;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#5654A2;"><i data-lucide="folder-git-2" style="width:0.8em;height:0.8em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
     <div style="font-size:0.55em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.2;">Keep skills in a Git repo</div>
    </div>

    <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.42em 0.7em;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.5em 1fr;gap:0.6em;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(86,84,162,0.08);">
     <div style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;border-radius:0.4em;background:#EEEDF8;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#5654A2;"><i data-lucide="link" style="width:0.8em;height:0.8em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
     <div style="font-size:0.55em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.2;">Symlink into <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.85em;background:#EEEDF8;color:#5654A2;padding:0.05em 0.3em;border-radius:4px;">~/.claude/skills/</code></div>
    </div>

    <code style="display:block;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.44em;color:#564232;background:#F8F7F0;border:1px solid #ECE8DC;padding:0.35em 0.55em;border-radius:7px;">ln -s ~/skills/* ~/.claude/skills/  <span style="color:#9B8EA0;"># one script links all</span></code>

   </div>
  </div>

  <!-- RIGHT GROUP: Name it wisely -->
  <div style="position:relative;background:#F4FBF8;border-top:3px solid #2C8475;border-radius:14px;padding:0.9em 0.75em 0.75em;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(44,132,117,0.14);display:flex;flex-direction:column;text-align:left;">
   <div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.3em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.4em;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#FFFFFF;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#3DA890,#2C8475);padding:0.45em 1em;border-radius:999px;box-shadow:0 5px 16px rgba(44,132,117,0.4);white-space:nowrap;z-index:2;"><i data-lucide="tag" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:2.2;"></i>Name it wisely</div>

   <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0.45em;flex:1;justify-content:space-between;">

    <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.42em 0.7em;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.5em 1fr;gap:0.6em;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(44,132,117,0.08);">
     <div style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;border-radius:0.4em;background:#E5F2EE;border:1px solid #BCDFC0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;"><i data-lucide="type" style="width:0.8em;height:0.8em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
     <div style="font-size:0.55em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.2;">Prefix with your initials</div>
    </div>

    <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.42em 0.7em;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.5em 1fr;gap:0.6em;align-items:center;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(44,132,117,0.08);">
     <div style="width:1.5em;height:1.5em;border-radius:0.4em;background:#E5F2EE;border:1px solid #BCDFC0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;"><i data-lucide="layout-grid" style="width:0.8em;height:0.8em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
     <div style="font-size:0.55em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.2;">Stay grouped among many</div>
    </div>

    <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:10px;padding:0.5em 0.7em;box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(44,132,117,0.08);">
     <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.4em;color:#2C8475;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.5em;">the ph- family</div>
     <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.3em;">
      <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#E5F2EE;padding:0.18em 0.5em;border-radius:5px;color:#2C8475;font-weight:700;">ph-html</code>
      <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#E5F2EE;padding:0.18em 0.5em;border-radius:5px;color:#2C8475;font-weight:700;">ph-image</code>
      <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#E5F2EE;padding:0.18em 0.5em;border-radius:5px;color:#2C8475;font-weight:700;">ph-slide</code>
      <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#E5F2EE;padding:0.18em 0.5em;border-radius:5px;color:#2C8475;font-weight:700;">ph-card</code>
     </div>
    </div>

   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
